---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, an enhancement, or a change to an existing one
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use cases

Who benefits from this, and how? What concrete workflow does it improve?

- [ ] `backend-orchestrator`

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, links, or examples about the feature request here.
